_comment: Doc extraction priority for entity extraction pipeline. Higher = processed first. Run scripts/apply-doc-priority.js after editing. docs.tier is unreliable (defaulted to 'secondary') — use author/title/religion matching instead. Religion field uses 'Baha'i' (no diacritics). Extraction model tiers (EXTRACTION_TIER_HIGH/MID in .env-public): HIGH >= 400 → v4-pro, MID 100-399 → v4-flash, LOW < 100 → v4-flash.
_ordering_rationale: INTERPRETIVE-BEFORE-PRIMARY, and within the authoritative writings WORK BACKWARDS CHRONOLOGICALLY (interpreters before scripture) — deliberate. Order: GPB(1000) seed -> Dawn-Breakers(900) -> secondary histories(620-800) -> PILGRIM NOTES(600, eyewitness history + interpretive) -> modern HISTORICAL scholarship(580) -> then the authoritative writings NEWEST-FIRST: Shoghi Effendi(550) -> 'Abdu'l-Bahá(530) -> Bahá'u'lláh(510) -> the Báb(500). WHY: an interpretation is a CORRECTION of a non-obvious meaning that the primary text alone is prone to be MISread on; the correct concept must be formed FIRST (from the later interpreter) before the concept is encountered in the earlier primary text, or the source mis-seeds it. E.g. Shoghi Effendi fixes the true station of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, or the meaning of 'the day that shall not be followed by night,' before those appear in scripture. CHRONOLOGY MATTERS: latest interpreter -> earliest revelation. The 580 scholarship tier assumes HISTORICAL scholarship; devotional/apologetic work sits lower. First-match-wins by array order, so the specific Pilgrim-Notes collection match precedes author matches.
_other_rationale: Same backwards-chronological walk continues across dispensations (the Báb interprets the Qur'án, Bahá'u'lláh interprets all prior scripture): later revelation ranks above the earlier one it clarifies. All sit BELOW the Báb (500). Abrahamic chain is clear (Islam 470 > Christianity 460 > Judaism 440). The relative dating of the older/eastern Manifestations (Buddha/Zoroaster/Krishna) varies by source, and Sikh/Confucian/Tao/Jain sit outside the progressive-revelation interpretive chain — these placements are APPROXIMATE and flagged for user confirmation.
